# Skill: Package Initialization

## Purpose
Create the customer onboarding package under Engagements.

## Inputs
- customer-name
- yyyymmdd

## Steps
1. Create folder: Engagements/<customer-slug>-<yyyymmdd>/
2. Copy Templates/intake-worksheet.md to Engagements/<customer-slug>-<yyyymmdd>/intake-worksheet.md
3. Copy Templates/recommendation-template.md to Engagements/<customer-slug>-<yyyymmdd>/recommendation-memo.md
4. Confirm files exist before discovery starts.

## Done Criteria
- Customer folder exists.
- Both onboarding files exist in that folder.
- No customer-specific edits made in Templates.
